languages.text: "Я вижу гнев, переполняющий вас, но я не понимаю его причин. Потрудитесь объясниться".
"I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."
languages.original_text: "Я вижу гнев, переполняющий вас, но я не понимаю его причин. Потрудитесь объясниться".

traits.locale_text: "I see anger consuming you, but I do not understand its cause. Kindly explain yourselves."
"I see anger consuming you, but I do not understand its cause. Kindly explain yourselves."
"I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."
"I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."
"I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."
"I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."

languages.text: "Ich sehe, dass Ihr von Wut verzehrt werdet, verstehe aber nicht warum. Würdet Ihr Euch bitte erklären?"
languages.original_text: "I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe, dass Ihr von Wut verzehrt werdet, verstehe aber nicht warum. Würdet Ihr Euch bitte erklären?"

languages.text: « Je vois que la haine vous consume, bien que je ne m'explique pas pourquoi. Expliquez-vous. »
languages.original_text: "I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois que la haine vous consume, bien que je ne m'explique pas pourquoi. Expliquez-vous. »

languages.text: “我看得出你们都满腔怒火，但不明白是为什么。烦请解释一下。”
languages.original_text: "I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."

traits.locale_text: “我看得出你们都满腔怒火，但不明白是为什么。烦请解释一下。”

languages.text: «Veo que la ira los consume, pero no entiendo el por qué. Explíquense».
languages.original_text: "I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."

traits.locale_text: «Veo que la ira los consume, pero no entiendo el por qué. Explíquense».

languages.text: 「怒りに燃えているようだが、その理由がわからない。説明してください」
languages.original_text: "I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."

traits.locale_text: 「怒りに燃えているようだが、その理由がわからない。説明してください」

languages.text: "Görüyorum ki öfkeye kapılmışsınız ama nedenini anlamıyorum. Lütfen açıklayın."
languages.original_text: "I see you are consumed with anger, but I do not understand why. Kindly explain yourselves."

traits.locale_text: "Görüyorum ki öfkeye kapılmışsınız ama nedenini anlamıyorum. Lütfen açıklayın."
